---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to spuR
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What would you like spuR to do?

## Why this belongs in spuR

Is this about the public API, numerical behavior, parity with Stata/Matlab, docs/examples, or packaging/CI?

## Alternatives considered

What are you doing today instead?

## Additional context

Examples, code snippets, related issues, or parity expectations versus Stata/Matlab.
